sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55992" key="katoide/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατοιδέω</orth>, <tns opt="n" TEIform="tns">pf.</tns> -<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῴδηκα</foreign>, <sense id="n55992.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be swollen</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.43</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
